'''竏喇-zh-zh''' ('''kahazhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vampirise|vampirise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vampirise|vampirise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-zh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kahazhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazhazh|thihazhazh]] || [[word:jihazhazh|jihazhazh]] || [[word:shihazhazh|shihazhazh]] || [[word:kihazhazh|kihazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhazhazh|thuthuhazhazh]] || [[word:jujuhazhazh|jujuhazhazh]] || [[word:shushuhazhazh|shushuhazhazh]] || [[word:kukuhazhazh|kukuhazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhazhazh|thuhazhazh]] || [[word:juhazhazh|juhazhazh]] || [[word:shuhazhazh|shuhazhazh]] || [[word:kuhazhazh|kuhazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhazhazh|thuhazhazh]] || [[word:juhazhazh|juhazhazh]] || [[word:shuhazhazh|shuhazhazh]] || [[word:kuhazhazh|kuhazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehazhazh|thehazhazh]] || [[word:jehazhazh|jehazhazh]] || [[word:shehazhazh|shehazhazh]] || [[word:kehazhazh|kehazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohazhazh|thothohazhazh]] || [[word:jojohazhazh|jojohazhazh]] || [[word:shoshohazhazh|shoshohazhazh]] || [[word:kokohazhazh|kokohazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohazhazh|thohazhazh]] || [[word:johazhazh|johazhazh]] || [[word:shohazhazh|shohazhazh]] || [[word:kohazhazh|kohazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohazhazh|thohazhazh]] || [[word:johazhazh|johazhazh]] || [[word:shohazhazh|shohazhazh]] || [[word:kohazhazh|kohazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦhazhazh|thﾃｦhazhazh]] || [[word:jﾃｦhazhazh|jﾃｦhazhazh]] || [[word:shﾃｦhazhazh|shﾃｦhazhazh]] || [[word:kﾃｦhazhazh|kﾃｦhazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahazhazh|thathahazhazh]] || [[word:jajahazhazh|jajahazhazh]] || [[word:shashahazhazh|shashahazhazh]] || [[word:kakahazhazh|kakahazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahazhazh|thahazhazh]] || [[word:jahazhazh|jahazhazh]] || [[word:shahazhazh|shahazhazh]] || [[word:kahazhazh|kahazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahazhazh|thahazhazh]] || [[word:jahazhazh|jahazhazh]] || [[word:shahazhazh|shahazhazh]] || [[word:kahazhazh|kahazhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahazhazh|shahazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahazhazh|goshahazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahazhazh|gokishahazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahazhazhnﾃｼ|shahazhazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnknﾃｼ|goshahazhazhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhnﾃｼ|gokishahazhazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahazhazhshﾃｫ|shahazhazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫ|goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhshﾃｫ|gokishahazhazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhazhro|shahazhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkro|goshahazhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhro|gokishahazhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhazhmu|shahazhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkmu|goshahazhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhmu|gokishahazhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahazhazhsher|shahazhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnksher|goshahazhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhsher|gokishahazhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahazhazhng|shahazhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkng|goshahazhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhng|gokishahazhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahazhazhya|shahazhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkya|goshahazhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhya|gokishahazhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahazhazhyam|shahazhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkyam|goshahazhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhyam|gokishahazhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shahazhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshahazhazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishahazhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhazhnﾃｼro|shahazhazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnknﾃｼro|goshahazhazhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhnﾃｼro|gokishahazhazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhazhnﾃｼmu|shahazhazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnknﾃｼmu|goshahazhazhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhnﾃｼmu|gokishahazhazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shahazhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishahazhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhazhshﾃｫro|shahazhazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫro|goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhshﾃｫro|gokishahazhazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhazhshﾃｫmu|shahazhazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫmu|goshahazhazhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhshﾃｫmu|gokishahazhazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhazhronﾃｼ|shahazhazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkronﾃｼ|goshahazhazhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhronﾃｼ|gokishahazhazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhazhroshﾃｫ|shahazhazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkroshﾃｫ|goshahazhazhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhroshﾃｫ|gokishahazhazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazhazhromu|shahazhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkromu|goshahazhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhromu|gokishahazhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazhazhmunﾃｼ|shahazhazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkmunﾃｼ|goshahazhazhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhmunﾃｼ|gokishahazhazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazhazhmushﾃｫ|shahazhazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkmushﾃｫ|goshahazhazhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhmushﾃｫ|gokishahazhazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazhazhmuro|shahazhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazhazhnkmuro|goshahazhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazhazhmuro|gokishahazhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
